steps.name: motion-trigger
steps.summary: Added frame-diff motion detection (2s interval, >30 brightness units, motionThreshold prop) to WebcamCapture; only fires capture when motion detected under auto mode.

steps.name: schedule-trigger
steps.summary: Added GET /api/patient/schedule returning active patient dose times; WebcamCapture polls every 60s on pill cam, captures within ±10 min of any dose_time, deduplicates per window via lastScheduledCaptureRef.

steps.name: bill-protector-gemini
steps.summary: Implemented classifyTransaction in billProtector.ts with Zod-validated BillProtectorResult; flags blocked categories (urgent), over-limit single txn, and daily limit breaches (attention); 6 unit tests all passing.

steps.name: nightly-summary-cron
steps.summary: Implemented GET /api/cron/nightly-summary: loads today's events, calls Gemini for a one-paragraph summary (or returns quiet-day fallback), enqueues outbox message, returns { ok, summary }.

steps.name: smoke-e2e
steps.summary: Typecheck and all 27 tests pass; documented phase 1 smoke results in demos/phase-1-smoke.md covering schedule API, nightly-summary cron, and /cam/pill page.
